_comment: Matt Pocock's engineering skills - disciplined workflows for plan, bug, feature, triage, architecture, and exploration. Run /setup-matt-pocock-skills once per repo before first use.
companyAnnouncements:
[Matt] Plan: /grill-with-docs -> /to-prd -> /to-issues (interview against CONTEXT.md, synthesize PRD, split into vertical-slice tracer-bullet issues)
[Matt] Bug: /diagnose (feedback loop -> reproduce -> 3-5 ranked hypotheses -> instrument one variable -> fix + regression test -> cleanup + post-mortem)
[Matt] Feature: /tdd (vertical tracer bullets one test -> one impl; NEVER write all tests then all code) | /prototype (throwaway: LOGIC terminal app or UI variants)
[Matt] Triage: /triage — sort a new/unsorted issue into needs-info (ask reporter) / ready-for-agent (AFK can grab it) / ready-for-human (judgment call) / wontfix. Use when issues pile up or before handing one to an agent.
[Matt] Explore: /zoom-out (unfamiliar code -> module + caller map) | /improve-codebase-architecture (shallow -> deep modules; HTML report in $TMPDIR)
